question: The concept of 'hydraulic radius' in rivers
options: The river has more sediment than it can carry, splitting into multiple channels
Hard engineering (sea walls) and soft engineering (beach nourishment)
Cross-sectional area divided by wetted perimeter — measures efficiency
Soluble rock is dissolved and carried in solution
answer: Cross-sectional area divided by wetted perimeter — measures efficiency

question: 'Corrosion' (solution) in rivers
options: The minimum population needed to support a good or service
Movement of people from cities to rural areas as urban quality of life declines
Soluble rock is dissolved and carried in solution
Regeneration improves areas for existing residents; gentrification often displaces them
answer: Soluble rock is dissolved and carried in solution

question: The concept of 'push-pull migration model'
options: The maximum distance consumers will travel for a good or service
A buried ice block melts leaving a depression often filled with water
Redeveloping and improving run-down urban areas
Push factors drive people away; pull factors attract them elsewhere
answer: Push factors drive people away; pull factors attract them elsewhere

question: A 'barchan dune' forms in deserts when
options: Wind blows from one direction creating a crescent-shaped dune
The minimum population needed to support a good or service
In periglacial environments where temperatures oscillate around 0°C
The river has more sediment than it can carry, splitting into multiple channels
answer: Wind blows from one direction creating a crescent-shaped dune

question: The concept of 'counterurbanisation'
options: Movement of people from cities to rural areas as urban quality of life declines
Wind blows from one direction creating a crescent-shaped dune
The maximum distance consumers will travel for a good or service
Push factors drive people away; pull factors attract them elsewhere
answer: Movement of people from cities to rural areas as urban quality of life declines

question: 'Freeze-thaw weathering' is most active
options: In periglacial environments where temperatures oscillate around 0°C
Push factors drive people away; pull factors attract them elsewhere
Redeveloping and improving run-down urban areas
Landslides, mudflows, soil creep and slumping
answer: In periglacial environments where temperatures oscillate around 0°C

Cross-sectional area divided by wetted perimeter — measures efficiency
The river has more sediment than it can carry, splitting into multiple channels

options: Push factors drive people away; pull factors attract them elsewhere
The river has more sediment than it can carry, splitting into multiple channels

answer: The river has more sediment than it can carry, splitting into multiple channels

options: Redeveloping and improving run-down urban areas
Material carried in solution, suspension and as bed load

answer: Material carried in solution, suspension and as bed load
